# Cellular Respiration

Cellular respiration is the set of metabolic reactions and processes that
take place in the cells of organisms to convert chemical energy from
oxygen molecules and nutrients into adenosine triphosphate (ATP).

## Q&A

**Q: What is the goal of cellular respiration?**
To convert glucose and oxygen into ATP, the energy currency of the cell,
producing carbon dioxide and water as byproducts.
